1. [completed] [main-agent] Determine the evidence and data source needed to answer who was the best bowler in IPL 2025.
2. [completed] [mcp-executor] Compute or extract the relevant bowling performance metrics for the 2025 season.
3. [pending] [tool-executor] Generate a clear, engaging data blog post with narrative writing, charts, and tables, using deep analysis in Python with pandas and numpy to surface insights.
4. [pending] [tool-executor] Print the path of the generated HTML file.
